settings.title: Settings
settings.hapticsBody: Short vibrations on key actions: flash, unlock, validation.
settings.markerCustomizationSubtitle: Shapes, colors and glow for invaders
settings.notificationsBody: Get notified when an invader is added or updated.
settings.comingSoonBody: This section will be available in a future update.
settings.creditsBody:
The mosaics and the concept of hunting invaders are the work of the artist Invader. This app does not replace or compete with the official FlashInvaders app, it's simply a complementary experience made by a fan.

Data such as artwork condition, pose dates, points, and photos are sourced from invader-spotter.art and the official app.

Thanks to the entire community keeping the invader hunt alive: on Instagram, in blogs, on alternative maps, and by sharing tips.

Built by DROUUU (FlashInvaders).
settings.supportBody: If you enjoy this app, you can support development by buying the dev a coffee.
settings.supportIntro: This donation is entirely optional. It's totally fine to enjoy the app for free. If you do choose to chip in, it helps a lot to keep the app maintained, ship updates, and pay for server costs.
settings.supportFree: The app is free and will stay free, with 100% of the features available to everyone.
settings.supportLinkUnavailable: Could not open the donation link.
settings.contactBody: For any question or suggestion, reach out to the developer.
settings.contactNotice: Please keep messages short and relevant. The app is built by one person - quick handling is easier with low noise.
settings.roadmapIntro: A preview of the features in preparation for upcoming versions of the app.

guestMode.title: Guest mode
guestMode.body: Use the app without an account. Flashes stay on your phone and transfer when you sign up.

flashImport.title: Import my flashes
flashImport.intro: Automatically retrieve your flashes from the official FlashInvaders app installed on your Android phone, via your PC.
flashImport.step1Body: With the account you want to import your flashes into.
flashImport.step2Title: Connect your phone to the PC
flashImport.step2Body: USB cable. Allow data transfer if prompted.
flashImport.step3Body: Settings → About → tap 7 times on "Build number" to enable developer options, then enable "USB debugging". Accept the prompt on your phone.
flashImport.step4Body: On your Windows PC, double-click the downloaded .exe. Windows SmartScreen will show a warning (unsigned app): click "More info" → "Run anyway". Enter your InvadersHunter credentials when prompted.
flashImport.step5Body: Once the import is done, return to the Profile screen and tap "Sync now" to pull the imported flashes into the app.
flashImport.downloadNote: No prerequisites: the script automatically downloads the required Android tools (~10 MB, once). Windows only for now.
flashImport.alternativeNote: If ADB doesn't work, paste a list of invader names (one per line or comma-separated). File extensions are ignored.
flashImport.done: Flashes imported. Run again when you have new flashes.
flashImport.linkUnavailableBody: Could not open the download link.
flashImport.noNamesBody: Paste at least one invader name (one per line).

colorMode.title: Color mode
colorMode.flashBody: Marker color reflects your flash status. Red markers are not yet flashed, captured ones show in a different color.
colorMode.rarityBody: Each rarity tier (by points value) has its own distinct hue, regardless of flash status.

greyMode.title: Grey out
greyMode.allBody: All destroyed or not-visible invaders are greyed on the map, whether captured or not.
greyMode.flashedBody: Destroyed invaders you already captured keep their color. Only uncaptured ones are greyed.
greyMode.offBody: No greying. Every marker shows in full color regardless of its state.

filters.title: Filters
filters.statusBody: Show all invaders, only those you've already flashed, or only those you haven't captured yet.
filters.condBody: 'Flashable' shows invaders in a state that can still be flashed. 'Unflashable' shows destroyed or not-visible ones only.
filters.pointsBody: Restrict to one or more rarity tiers. Select multiple values to combine them.
filters.combineTip: All three filters combine. Example: Unflashed + Flashable + 50pts shows only 50-point invaders you haven't captured that can still be flashed.

routing.title: Hunt
routing.overviewOpenBody: Tap the flag button at the bottom-left of the map to open the routing panel.
routing.overviewZone2Body: Your departure point - search an address, pick on the map, or use your location.
routing.overviewZone3Body: Invaders you want to force-include, regardless of detour. Tap them on the map while the panel is open.
routing.overviewZone4Body: Your end point. Hidden in loop mode.
routing.overviewZone5Body: Expand to set detour time, filters, and loop mode. Tap Start to compute.
routing.coordsBody: Set where your route begins and ends.
routing.coordStep1Body: Type in the search field to find any address or place.
routing.coordStep2Body: Tap the map icon to close the panel and drop a pin at any location.
routing.coordStep3Body: Tap the location icon to instantly set your current GPS position as the start.
routing.coordStep4Body: Enable the Loop chip in options to replace the destination with a circuit, the route returns to your start.
routing.detourBody: Control how far the route strays from the direct path, and which invaders are eligible.
routing.detourStep1Body: Use − / + to set the max detour time. 0 = direct route with no stops. More time = more invaders included.
routing.detourStep2Body: When active, already flashed invaders are excluded from the route.
routing.detourStep3Body: Excludes invaders in a degraded or destroyed state that cannot be flashed.
routing.invadersBody: While the routing panel is open, tap any invader on the map to add it as a mandatory stop.
routing.invadersStep1Body: Selected invaders are highlighted on the map and shown in the panel.
routing.invadersStep2Body: Tap the same invader again to deselect it, or use the × button in the panel to clear all mandatory stops.
routing.invadersTip: Mandatory stops are always included in the route, even outside the detour range.

appUpdate.title: Update available
appUpdate.body: A new version of the app is available (v{{latest}}). You are currently on v{{current}}.
appUpdate.upToDateBody: You are on the latest version.

guest.gateMessage: Create a free account to submit additions and edits, and back up your flashes online. Your local flashes will be transferred automatically.
guest.createAccountSubtitle: Back up your flashes online and unlock contributions
guest.loginSubtitle: Your guest flashes will be added to your account
